text.title: shadcn/ui Component Patterns
text.summary: Primitive pattern, composition pattern, compound component pattern, theming setup, and installation workflow.

example.note: Exports both component and variants function. Uses semantic token names only. displayName set after forwardRef.
Compositions extend, never modify, primitives. Feature-specific logic stays outside `components/ui/`.

section.title: Theming

example.note: All colors as HSL triplets in CSS vars. Components reference `var(--background)` via Tailwind utilities — never hardcoded hex.

section.reference: Bulk-scaffold shadcn primitives and generate barrel export
